query:
-- Check existing DataGate billing items
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplierName
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
LIMIT 20;

FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
